branches.name: Engineering
branches.description: Harvard John A. Paulson School of Engineering and Applied Sciences offers cutting-edge programs in AI, robotics, bioengineering, and data science with strong interdisciplinary research.

branches.name: Business
branches.description: Harvard Business School is globally recognized for its MBA program, focusing on leadership, entrepreneurship, and case-based learning.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: Harvard Law School is one of the most prestigious law schools globally, specializing in constitutional law, corporate law, and international law.

branches.name: Medicine
branches.description: Harvard Medical School leads in biomedical research and clinical education, affiliated with top hospitals like Massachusetts General Hospital.

branches.name: Arts & Humanities
branches.description: Harvard’s Faculty of Arts and Sciences offers programs in history, philosophy, literature, and social sciences with strong global academic influence.

branches.name: Engineering
branches.description: MIT is a global leader in engineering, AI, robotics, and innovation with strong industry collaboration and cutting-edge research.

branches.name: Science
branches.description: MIT's School of Science is world-renowned for fundamental and applied research in physics, chemistry, and mathematics.

branches.name: Business
branches.description: MIT Sloan School of Management focuses on innovation, entrepreneurship, and quantitative leadership in the global economy.

branches.name: Humanities
branches.description: The School of Humanities, Arts, and Social Sciences (SHASS) at MIT explores the human impact of technological breakthroughs.

branches.name: Architecture
branches.description: MIT Department of Architecture is a pioneer in sustainable design, computational architecture, and urban planning.

branches.name: Engineering
branches.description: Stanford Engineering is globally renowned for innovation, AI, and entrepreneurship with deep ties to Silicon Valley.

branches.name: Business

branches.name: Law

branches.name: Medicine
branches.description: Stanford Medicine focuses on precision health and translational medicine, integrated with the Stanford Hospital complex.

branches.name: Arts & Sciences
branches.description: The School of Humanities and Sciences at Stanford offers cross-disciplinary programs in literature, sociology, and biology.

branches.name: Engineering

branches.name: Physics

branches.name: Chemistry

branches.name: Biology

branches.name: Humanities
branches.description: The Division of the Humanities and Social Sciences (HSS) integrates technological perspectives into social research.
